latin: media nocte, die natali Harrii, aliquis ianuam casae vehementer pulsavit. ianua tota de cardine cecidit. Hagrid, vir immensae staturae, intravit. placentam natalem Harrio dedit quam ipse fecerat. tum dixit verba quae vitam Harrii mutaverunt: 'magus es, Harri.' Harrius obstupuit. 'ego — quid?' rogavit. Hagrid ei de schola magica Hogvartensi narravit.

questions.prompt: When did Hagrid arrive at the hut?
What life-changing words did Hagrid say to Harry?
What did Hagrid tell Harry about?

translation: At midnight, on Harry's birthday, someone knocked on the door of the hut violently. The whole door fell off its hinge. Hagrid, a man of immense stature, entered. He gave Harry a birthday cake that he himself had made. Then he said the words that changed Harry's life: 'You're a wizard, Harry.' Harry was stunned. 'I — what?' he asked. Hagrid told him about the magical school Hogwarts.
